description: This task sets sharing limitations in OneDrive to help protect tenant data. It also enables smart sign-in and disk space optimization.
userImpact: OneDrive will be set up on Windows devices in accordance with the configured policy.

managementTemplateSteps.displayName: Configure OneDrive policy for Windows 10 and later
managementTemplateSteps.description: This task sets sharing limitations in OneDrive to help protect tenant data. It also enables smart sign-in and disk space optimization.

informationLinks.displayName: Use OneDrive policies to control sync settings

settings.name: settings.1.settingInstance.choiceSettingValue.value

settings.displayName: Allow syncing OneDrive accounts for only specific organizations

settings.displayName: Allow users to choose how to handle Office file sync conflicts (User)

settings.displayName: Always use the user's Windows display language when provisioning known folders in OneDrive (User)

settings.name: settings.6.settingInstance.choiceSettingValue.value

settings.displayName: Cause sync client to ignore normal web proxy detection logic
